nodes.label: AI as writing and grammar assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable for nuanced writing
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to double-check my grammar and to ensure what I am writing is clear

nodes.label: AI as tone checker for professional communication
nodes.label_negative: AI as producing artificial, canned writing
nodes.grounding_span: ask it to change the tone to be more persuasive, but I haven't had a lot of luck

nodes.label: AI as marketing content generator
nodes.label_negative: AI as giving terrible advice and false statistics
nodes.grounding_span: I have asked about an idea of mine and how I could implement it, and it gave me terrible advice

nodes.label: AI as step-by-step guidance tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as offering praise without constructive criticism
nodes.grounding_span: when I ask for subjective guidance, I get praise and not constructive criticism

nodes.label: AI as task delegator for complete tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as incapable of subjective or creative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I will delegate very simple objective tasks

nodes.label: Authentic conversational writing style
nodes.grounding_span: My style of writing in advertisement is conversational

nodes.label: Authenticity and personal integrity
nodes.grounding_span: I want the customers to feel like I am talking to them, not talking at them

nodes.label: Efficiency and accuracy in analytical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: When I have objective requests such as grammar checks and word searches I do feel satisfied

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for simple syntax issues
nodes.grounding_span: When I have objective requests such as grammar checks and word searches I do feel satisfied

nodes.label: Frustration with AI for persuasive writing
nodes.grounding_span: I get frustrated when it cannot grasp the nuance of language

nodes.label: Skepticism toward AI for marketing strategy
nodes.grounding_span: I looked up those statistics and they were not true

nodes.label: Resignation to AI inevitability
nodes.grounding_span: I don't see myself using it for subjective or creative tasks

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: I would ask for it to be persuasive but not too flowery, and then it gave me a Spartan blurb

nodes.label: Comparative evaluation of AI vs human writing patterns
nodes.grounding_span: It's getting much easier to spot AI writing and these are the tell-tale clues
